name: international_security_heat_dome_stresses_cedar_tru_loy
premise: A International Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving international security heat dome stresses cedar tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the next shift change. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Keisha Bennett
agents.identity: I am Keisha Bennett, accountable for a defensible call in International Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Hector Serrano
agents.identity: I am Hector Serrano, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in International Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the next shift change. Evidence is partial. Keisha Bennett must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Keisha Bennett do?
